channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Iran assures safety of Philippine ships and seafarers in the Strait of Hormuz, says DFA
item.description: The Department of Foreign Affairs (DFA) confirmed that Iran has agreed to allow the safe passage of Philippine-flagged ships and Filipino seafarers passing through the Strait of Hormuz, one of the wor...

item.title: Israel escalates attacks on Lebanon as regional tensions rise and Australia faces LNG export concerns
item.description: The latest Crikey report by Rich James outlines a surge in regional conflict as Israel’s Defence Forces (IDF) intensify airstrikes on Lebanon despite explicit warnings from Iran of a ‘regret-inducing ...

item.title: Bhuvneshwar Kumar Reflects on His Journey as He Completes 200 Matches in the IPL
item.description: In a touching milestone moment, Indian pacer Bhuvneshwar Kumar completed 200 matches in the Indian Premier League (IPL), marking a notable chapter in his long and steady cricketing career. Representin...

item.title: CBSE 10th and 12th Results 2026: Exam Dates and Access Details
item.description: The CBSE Board has announced that the results for Class 10th and 12th for the year 2026 will be released soon. Students and parents should note that the official results will be accessible through the...

item.title: WHO asks Israel to reconsider hospital evacuation in Beirut due to humanitarian risk
item.description: The World Health Organisation (WHO) don warn say Israel evacuation order for Beirut fit cause wahala for healthcare delivery. The director-general, Tedros Ghebreyesus, yarn for one statement wey dem p...

item.title: Confessions of a middle-aged woman: how divorce and loneliness led to cocaine use and recovery
item.description: The article, written under the pseudonym Lara Wyndham, recounts the experience of a 54-year-old British woman who fell into cocaine use after her marriage collapsed. Lara describes how, despite living...

item.title: Nitish Kumar sworn in as Rajya Sabha MP; Bihar awaits new Chief Minister
item.description: On 10th April 2026, Nitish Kumar, the veteran leader of JD(U) and the longest-serving Chief Minister of Bihar, formally took oath as a member of the Rajya Sabha, nearly a month after his election on 1...

item.title: Dragons Mount a Fightback Against Manly in Wollongong Showdown
item.description: In an intense NRL 2026 clash, the St George Illawarra Dragons have mounted a comeback against Manly Sea Eagles in Wollongong. After a slow start, the Dragons fell behind early with the Sea Eagles lead...

item.title: How to Manage Overwhelm and Find Calm in Today's Crisis-Filled World
item.description: In an era marked by global unrest and constant crises, many individuals are struggling to cope with the constant pressure of modern life. Overwhelm is becoming a rational response to the challenges we...

item.title: Musician Guardian Angel Begins Project to Develop His 20-Acre Waingo Farm in Three Months
item.description: Veteran Kenyan gospel artist Guardian Angel has revealed that he recently bought a vast 20-acre piece of land and has already started developing it. In a video shared online, the musician showed worke...

item.title: Tanzanian golfers show strong performance at East Africa Swing Qualifier
item.description: Several Tanzanian golfers have made an excellent impression at the SDT East Africa Swing Qualifying School, showing that sports talent in the country continues to rise. The event, held as part of the ...

item.title: Harriet Harman accuses Nigel Farage of leading a culture war over his comments on Kanye West
item.description: In a recent development in British politics, former Labour minister Harriet Harman has criticised Reform UK leader Nigel Farage, accusing him of leading a culture war. The comments stem from Farage's ...

item.title: Assam HSLC 2026 Results: Step-by-Step Guide to Access Marksheet on DigiLocker
item.description: The Assam Board has officially declared the 10th-grade HSLC results for 2026. Students who appeared for the examination can now access their marksheets online using DigiLocker. To check the results, s...

item.title: Supreme Court Dismisses Sarah Discaya's Petition Over Ghost Flood Control Project
item.description: The Supreme Court (SC) has dismissed the petition filed by contractor Sarah Discaya, challenging the Ombudsman’s finding of probable cause in the case involving a P96.5-million ghost flood control pro...

item.title: Ostrich Farm's False Claims Led to Costly and Controversial Cull in B.C.
item.description: Universal Ostrich Farms in B.C. became the centre of a controversial legal and social media battle after the federal government ordered the cull of nearly 400 ostriches in response to an avian flu out...

item.title: Drama Festival Showcases Concerns Over Betting Addiction Among Students
item.description: Aki, things were getting real at the Kenya National Drama and Film Festival (KNDFF) at Kagumo Teachers Training College. The youngins, they weren’t shy about tackling the whole betting situation which...

item.title: Commemoration of Chris Hani, Liberation Struggle Icon, Marks 33 Years Since His Assassination
item.description: The South African government, through the Department of Sport, Arts and Culture, in collaboration with the Mpumalanga provincial government, is hosting a significant commemoration to honour Chris Hani...

item.title: OpenAI postpones UK investment citing high energy costs and regulatory challenges amid Net Zero policy
item.description: OpenAI has paused its Stargate UK project, a multi-billion-pound investment in the United Kingdom, due to high energy prices and regulatory concerns. The project, part of a £150 billion investment ser...

item.title: Sophia Bush and Ashlyn Harris' Relationship Journey: From Divorce to New Love
item.description: Sophia Bush and Ashlyn Harris, both famous in their own right, started a romantic relationship after divorcing their respective spouses in 2023. Ashlyn, a retired soccer player, ended her marriage to ...

item.title: KRA Commissioner General Wattanga removed amid tech and revenue concerns, nominated as High Commissioner
item.description: Kenya Revenue Authority (KRA) Commissioner General, Humprey Wattanga, was removed from office after refusing to resign under pressure from the National Treasury. The KRA Board terminated his contract,...
